title: episcia pulchella
intro: Episcia pulchella, also known as the Colombian jewelflower, is a species of flowering plant in the Gesneriaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Episcia pulchella include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to address a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
